# Domain-Driven Design

Use this skill when the architecture needs explicit domain boundaries.

## Procedure

1. Identify bounded contexts.
2. Define aggregates and consistency rules.
3. Clarify domain services versus application services.
4. Identify integration points and anti-corruption needs.

## Useful Output

- Bounded contexts
- Aggregates
- Domain services
- Integration boundaries
